content: Run mandatory testing gate - all tests must pass before sprint work
Fix GLM test failures - matrix dimension mismatch
Conduct take stock assessment of progress toward R superiority goals
Plan next sprint work based on assessment results
CRITICAL: Fix OpenBLAS build failure to enable benchmark validation
Migrate optimcore from ndarray-linalg to faer for consistency
Get performance benchmarks running and establish R baseline comparison
Measure current performance against CLAUDE.md targets (≥2x LM, ≥5x GLM)
